meta.description: Junior web developer and data specialist in Casablanca, Morocco. HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, WordPress, Excel dashboards, and industrial-grade quality control.

experience.title: A track record of
experience.description: Four roles across automotive quality control and production data — each one sharpened the same core promise: what I deliver is correct, on time, and documented.

education.title: Credentials that
education.description: International diplomas, hands-on training, and certificates — the formal foundation under the practical experience.

skills.title: A stack built on
skills.description: Honest levels, no inflation — strong foundations in web development and data work, and I level up every single week.

projects.title: Real work,
projects.description: Selected work from my professional roles and training — presented as case studies: the problem, what I built, and what it delivers.

services.title: What I can
services.description: Available for freelance projects and junior positions — remote or in Casablanca.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.description: Have a role, a project, or just a question? Email is the fastest way to reach me — I reply within 24 hours.
contact.formNote: Opens your email app with the message ready to send — no data is stored.

easterEgg: You found the secret! Precision and fun.
